/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libfile_service_core.so -o libfile_service_core.so CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/can_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/parsed_mmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/mmap/mmap_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/mmap/mmap_canid_idx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/mmap/mmap_chnl_idx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/mmap/mmap_dir_idx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/parsed_entry_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/can_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/can_log_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/mmap/mmap_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core.dir/mmap/mmap_header_constract.cpp.o
